prompt: Wir benotigen die Skrivebordlampe-Ausgabe aus dieser Quittung in der Abteilung Produksjon. Verwenden Sie das richtige Aufwandskonto und stellen Sie die korrekte MwSt.-Behandlung sicher.
result:
Perfect! The voucher has been successfully created. The system automatically created a VAT posting for the 25% input VAT (1300 kr) to the appropriate VAT account.

**Summary:**
- Created voucher for Skrivebordlampe expense of 6500 kr in the Produksjon department
- Used account 6800 (Kontorrekvisita) as the appropriate expense account for office equipment
- Applied VAT type ID 1 (25% input VAT) for proper VAT treatment
- Balanced the voucher with payment from bank account 1920
- Tripletex automat
